faqs.question: What platforms is Super Traffic Racer available on?
faqs.answer: Super Traffic Racer is available to play directly in your browser, on both desktop and mobile devices.

faqs.question: Is there multiplayer in Super Traffic Racer?
faqs.answer: Super Traffic Racer is a single-player game focused on high-speed driving and traffic dodging. Currently, there is no multiplayer mode.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of Super Traffic Racer?
faqs.answer: The goal is to drive as far as possible without crashing, while weaving through traffic and collecting coins to unlock new vehicles.

faqs.question: Can I unlock new cars in Super Traffic Racer?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can collect coins during gameplay and use them to unlock various cars with different performance stats.

faqs.question: Are there different modes in Super Traffic Racer?
faqs.answer: Yes, the game offers multiple modes including One-Way, Two-Way, and Time Attack, each offering a different driving challenge.

faqs.question: Do I need to install anything to play Super Traffic Racer?
faqs.answer: No installation is required. Simply visit the game page in your browser and start playing instantly.

faqs.question: Are there any tips for high scores?
faqs.answer: Drive as fast as you can while staying close to traffic cars to gain bonus points. Overtaking from a close distance earns more score.

faqs.question: Does Super Traffic Racer support gamepad or keyboard controls?
faqs.answer: On desktop, you can play using arrow keys or a compatible gamepad. On mobile, use touch controls.
